recommendations.title: Christmas Vacation '90
recommendations.overview: Several characters coincide during the Christmas holidays in the winter season of Saint Moritz.

recommendations.title: Nineties
recommendations.overview: Scandalously famous collections of short Italian comedies of the 90s! All that was "fun" in those years in Italy - all here! The sea of black humor on all issues - sex, politics, mafia, crime, TV...

recommendations.title: Yours, Mine and Ours
recommendations.overview: When a widower with ten children marries a widow with eight, can the twenty of them ever come together as one big happy family?

recommendations.title: Simón
recommendations.overview: Simón, a Venezuelan freedom fighter exiled in Miami, copes not only with trauma, but also deep guilt over a choice he must make: stay in Miami and start a new life, or return home to the losing fight against a tyrannical regime.
